title: galium erectum var. scabridum
intro: Galium erectum var. scabridum, also known as rough bedstraw, is a variety of the Galium erectum plant, a flowering plant in the bedstraw family that is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Galium erectum var. scabridum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
